metadata.title: Paste URL into selection
metadata.description: Paste URL into selection Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: ![selection](url) will be used for URL that matches the following list.
ast.target: ![selection](url) 将用于匹配以下列表的 URL。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Rules are regex-based, split by line break.
ast.target: 规则基于正则表达式，以换行符分隔。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 url-into-selection 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 url-into-selection 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Regular expression used to match URLs when default match fails.
ast.target: 当默认匹配失败时，用于匹配 URL 的正则表达式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto Select: Automatically select word surrounding the cursor.
ast.target: 自动选择：自动选择光标周围的单词。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Behavior on pasting URL when nothing is selected
ast.target: 粘贴 URL 时未选中任何内容的行为

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 在此处输入正则表达式..

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid regex pattern in settings, using fallback:
ast.target: 设置中的正则表达式模式无效，正在使用备用模式：
